Clinical Hypnotherapy Services

The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.

Individual Therapy

Provide one-on-one online Strategic hypnotherapy session.

Seminars & Webinars

Deliver evidence-based workshops concerning recovery and self-growth.

Podcast

Delve into a range of psychosocial topics to create self and social awareness.

The Field Of Expertise

In this safe space, we utilize clinical hypnosis to engage with our clients and support them in addressing and facing their personal and relational challenges. Our ultimate goal is to help clients create a functional, healthy, and balanced life.

My area of expertise includes complications related to anxiety and psychological trauma.

For instance:

  • Obsessive-compulsive behaviors
  • Eating and weight complications
  • Gambling and substance use
  • Lack of self-love, self-esteem, and self-confidence
  • Lack of purpose, motivation, and meaning

About Me

I am Melika Taheri, a certified clinical hypnotherapist and strategic psychotherapist based in Sydney’s Lower North Shore – and I am here to offer assistance and support while walking alongside you as you navigate the complexity of your life.
I have been working as a therapist and a researcher since 2014. While I was completing my master’s and PhD degrees, I was privileged to work extensively with individuals from displaced backgrounds who experienced trauma and torture. My clientele has spanned all life stages, from kindergarten to empty nesting and beyond.
Now, by relying on a deep understanding of challenges mostly centring around anxiety, self-worth, and autonomy, I confidently offer a helping hand to empower you to meet your unique needs and wants.

We acknowledge all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Traditional Custodians of Country and recognize their connection to land, sea, culture and community. We pay respects to Elders past and present.
